item.title: IRS reminds sole proprietors to pay quarterly estimated taxes
item.description: Self-employed individuals and sole proprietors must pay estimated taxes using Form 1040-ES each quarter to avoid penalties.

item.title: S corporation reasonable compensation guidance updated
item.description: The IRS has updated guidance on what constitutes reasonable compensation for S corporation shareholder-employees.

item.title: New Section 179 expensing limits announced for tax year 2025
item.description: The IRS announced updated depreciation and Section 179 expensing limits applicable to small business asset purchases in 2025.

item.title: Home office deduction rules clarified for remote workers
item.description: The IRS clarified home office deduction eligibility for self-employed individuals and independent contractors working from home.

item.title: IRS extends filing deadline for disaster-affected areas
item.description: Taxpayers in presidentially declared disaster areas receive automatic extensions for filing and payment deadlines.
